[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Flags](https://www.banners.com/fabric-flags) 3. [Custom Flags](https://www.banners.com/custom-flags) 4. Rodeo Flags # **Custom Rodeo Flags** ![Custom Rodeo Flags | Banners.com](https://web2printdata.blob.core.windows.net/w2p-cms-1/25-03-05-BANS-Rodeo-Flags.jpg) Stand out in the arena by using custom rodeo flags! For sponsor displays and team representation or simply increasing your events visual appeal these flags are designed to attract attention. These flags are made to stay intact in rodeo dust and wind while performing well in action and display settings. Custom flags are the ultimate way to add additional excitement to your rodeo. So saddle up—it’s time to show off in style! * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Overview](#f668e42d-4871-4fc7-914d-798f7ca336ff) Step 1 - Choose Size and Quantity ## Choose Size Choose the size you want for your product Size (H x W): 1.0' 1.5' 2.0' 2.5' 3.0' 3.5' 4.0' 4.5' 1.0' 1.5' 2.0' 2.5' 3.0' 3.5' 4.0' 4.5' 5.0' 5.5' 6.0' 6.5' 7.0' 7.5' 8.0' Qty: Step 2 - Choose Add-Ons ## Choose Options Choose the options you want for your product ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Step 3 - Choose Design Method ## Pick a Template All Templates Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ #### [Material](#materialCollapse) All flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process. This means the ink dyes the fabric rather than sitting on top of the material. This allows the flag material to act in its natural state rather than being weighed down or made more rigid with ink adhered ot the surface. This is an important factor while looking for properly manufactured flags. The dye-sublimation printing process creates an eye-popping display. You can add full-color images, custom logos, graphics and text to your flag. **_\*\* Our fabric flags are a polyester-nylon blend. they are NOT the same material as a standard U.S. flag\*\*_** Our fabric material is temperature sensitive and due to the printing process it can expand and contract due to heat or cold. Because of this we cannot guarantee the exact size of any fabric product due to temperature fluctuations. We are not responsible for any product received that is too small or big for your purposes. If the size needs to be precise, such as if it is being installed into an existing frame or hardware, please express this to your CSR to discuss your specific application. **What is the lifespan of your 3x5 flags?** With proper care and installation, our custom made 3x5 flags have an outdoor life span of 3 to 6 months. We do however recommend that you take your flag down and store indoors during inclement weather to help increase its lifespan. **Do your 3x5 flags come with a warranty?** Yes, we offer a warranty on a prorated monthly basis for our standard flags. For example, a prorated warranty on a standard 3x5 flag that fails 2 months after proper installment will be replaced and we will cover 33% of the replacement cost for a new 3x5 flag. #### [Finishing Options](#finishing-optionsCollapse) **Flag Options** **Single / Reverse** * * * ![Single / Reverse Flag](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/Single-Reverse-Sided-bo
